data.content:
I can see the project — it's an MSTest project targeting .NET 8. The express test expects `15.00m` but `CalculateShipping` returns `10.00m`, so that one will fail.

I'll start `dotnet watch test` so tests re-run automatically whenever you save a file:

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Start dotnet watch test with hot reload

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Start dotnet watch test with hot reload

data.reasoningText:

But the project needs to compile for watch to work. Let me add the missing using directive and set up watch.
